<h1>
Country IP ranges
</h1>
Available formats:
<ul>
<li>ipset - <a href="http://www.iwik.org/ipcountry/ipset/SK">http://www.iwik.org/ipcountry/ipset/SK</a></li>
<li>nftables - <a href="http://www.iwik.org/ipcountry/nft/SK">http://www.iwik.org/ipcountry/nft/SK</a></li>
<li>mikrotik - <a href="http://www.iwik.org/ipcountry/mikrotik/SK">http://www.iwik.org/ipcountry/mikrotik/SK</a></li>
</ul>
See <a href="https://blog.erben.sk/2024/09/14/new-country-ip-ranges-generator/">https://blog.erben.sk/2024/09/14/new-country-ip-ranges-generator/</a> for details
<br>
